ATR = $1.19, so 2.5x ATR stop ~$3.00 above entry → SL ~$273.50, TP ~$267.50 (reversion to SMA20 $268.19 area). Expected hold: 3-5h through closing hour momentum. Target exit by 3:45 PM ET. CAVEAT: Our AAPL history is 0/3 WR — sizing at lower end (half-size) accordingly.
